auth.loggedInDesc: You're signed in. Open your dashboard to manage your creator page.
auth.loginSubtitle: Use the email and password for your Cupshai account.
auth.loginError: Could not log in. Check your email and password.

prelaunch.headline: Support your favorite creators,
prelaunch.subheadline: Cupshai is the first creator support platform built for Egypt and the Arab world. Tips, subscriptions, digital products — all in Arabic, all in EGP.
prelaunch.successMessage: You're on the list! We'll notify you at launch.
prelaunch.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
prelaunch.builtFor: Empowering creators across the Arab world.

earlyAccess.step1Title: We're building something big for creators.
earlyAccess.step1Desc: Leave your email to be among the first to discover it. Early creators will receive Founding Creator accounts with exclusive benefits when the platform launches.
earlyAccess.step1SmallText: Founding creators unlock special benefits at launch.
earlyAccess.step2Title: Great! Now let us get to know you better.
earlyAccess.step2Desc: Tell us a little about your creator profile so we can prepare the best experience for you.
earlyAccess.socialPlaceholder: Social media profile URL (Instagram / YouTube / TikTok / etc.)
earlyAccess.nichePlaceholder: Your niche (e.g. Comedy, Education, Lifestyle, Tech, Gaming, Film...)
earlyAccess.step3Desc: Early creators get priority access to claim their username before the public launch.
earlyAccess.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
earlyAccess.successTitle: You're now part of the Cupshai Founding Creators.
earlyAccess.successMessage: We'll notify you when Cupshai launches. Founding creators will unlock exclusive features, monetization opportunities, and collaborations.
earlyAccess.builtFor: Empowering creators across the Arab world.

landing.heroSub: Cupshai helps creators across Egypt and MENA earn from their passion — through tips, subscriptions, and more.

howItWorksSteps.title: Create your page
howItWorksSteps.desc: Set up your Cupshai profile in minutes. Add your bio, profile picture, and connect your payment method.

howItWorksSteps.title: Share with your fans
howItWorksSteps.desc: Share your Cupshai link on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or anywhere your audience follows you.

howItWorksSteps.title: Start earning
howItWorksSteps.desc: Receive tips and support directly to your Egyptian bank account or mobile wallet.

featuresItems.title: Tips & Support
featuresItems.desc: Fans can send you a 'cup of shai' (شاي) — a tip of any amount, anytime.

featuresItems.title: Creator Page
featuresItems.desc: Your personal page with your story, your work, and your support button.

featuresItems.title: Arabic First
featuresItems.desc: Fully bilingual platform. Your fans can use Cupshai in Arabic or English.

featuresItems.title: Local Payments
featuresItems.desc: EGP support with Egyptian bank cards. Fawry and Vodafone Cash coming soon.

featuresItems.title: Subscriptions
featuresItems.desc: Monthly memberships for your biggest fans. Exclusive content, early access. (Coming soon)

featuresItems.title: Creator Academy
featuresItems.desc: Learn how to grow and monetize your audience with our educational resources. (Coming soon)

landing.whyMenaTitle: Built for the Arab creator economy
whyMenaPoints: Support in Egyptian Pounds (EGP) — no currency conversion fees
Arabic interface with full RTL support
Local Egyptian payment methods (cards, mobile wallets)
Platform built and operated from Egypt
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to start earning from your passion?
landing.ctaSub: Be among the first creators on Cupshai and start earning.

compare.title: Why choose Cupshai?
compare.subtitle: We built what creators in Egypt and MENA actually needed.
compare.disclaimer: ✅ = Available now   🔜 = Coming soon   ❌ = Not available
compare.ctaTitle: Ready to join the future of Arab creator monetization?

footer.tagline: Supporting Arab creators, one cup at a time.

supporter.createAccountSub: Track who you supported, collect badges, and unlock features.
supporter.welcomeSub: Your supporter profile is ready. Track your support history, collect badges, and unlock features as you support more creators.
supporter.dmUnlockedDesc: You can now send direct messages to this creator.
supporter.dmLockedDesc: Support this creator with {remaining} more EGP to unlock DMs.

kyc.title: Identity Verification
kyc.subtitle: Complete verification to unlock withdrawals and comply with Egyptian regulations.
kyc.identityDesc: Enter your legal name exactly as it appears on your Egyptian National ID. All information must match your official documents.
kyc.fullNameArPlaceholder: الاسم كما هو موضح في البطاقة
kyc.matchIdNote: Must match your National ID exactly
kyc.ageRequirement: You must be 18 years or older
kyc.selfieDesc: Take a selfie holding your National ID next to your face
kyc.addressDesc: Provide your current residential address in Egypt. This must match the address on your utility bills or bank statements.
kyc.addressProofDesc: Upload a document showing your name and address
kyc.addressProofTypes: Utility bill, bank statement, or government letter (last 3 months)
kyc.bankDesc: Add your payout method. Your bank account or mobile wallet must be registered under your verified name.
kyc.walletNote: Must be the number registered with Vodafone Cash
kyc.amlNoticeDesc: All transactions are monitored per Central Bank of Egypt regulations. Suspicious activity may result in account review or temporary hold on withdrawals.
kyc.reviewDesc: Our compliance team is reviewing your documents. You'll be notified once your verification is complete.
kyc.verifiedDesc: Your identity has been verified. You can now withdraw funds.
kyc.rejectedDesc: There was an issue with your submitted documents. Please review and resubmit.

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.subtitle: Invite anyone and earn 50% of the platform commission from everyone who signs up via your link.
referral.commissionDesc: For everyone who signs up via your link, you earn 50% of the platform fee from their transactions.
referral.yourLinkDesc: Share this link with creators and fans.
referral.noReferralsDesc: Share your link and start earning commissions!
